verses.text: Tua ciangin a vekpi-in dingkhia uh a, Pilat mai-ah a paipih uh hi

Tua lai panin amah mawhzon' ding kipan uh a, “Hih mipa in ka mipihte uh lam khialsakin, kumpipa tungah siah piakloh dingin thu gen a, amahmah zong Khrih ahi kumpi khat ahihna a kigenna zong ka za uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Nang, Jew mite' kumpipa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Nang zong tua mah nong ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Pilat in siampi liante leh mihonte kiangah, “Hih mipa mawhsakna ding thu bangmah ka mu kei hi,” a ci hi

Ahi zongin amaute in nawhsa takin nakpau semsem uh a, “Amah in mite a buaina dingin thu hilh a, Galilee gam pan hong kipanin Judea gamsung khempeuhah hong hilh a, tu-in hih lai mun hong tungta hi,” a ci uh hi.
Pilat in hih thu a zak ciangin, “Hih mipa Galilee mi ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Jesuh pen Herod' ukna sung mi ahihlam a theih ciangin, tua laitakin Herod mah zong Jerusalem-ah om ahih manin ama kiangah a paisak hi
Herod in Jesuh' thu zaza a, amah a muhnop sawt mahmah khinta ahih manin Jesuh a muh ciangin a nuam mahmah hi. Jesuh in na lamdang a bawlte a mu dingin kilamen hi
Tua ahih manin Herod in thu tampi tak dong a, ahi zongin Jesuh in kam khat beek dawnglo hi
Siampi liante leh Thukham hilh siate in hong neh uh a, Jesuh mawhsakna thu nakpi takin hong gen uh hi
Tua ciangin Herod leh galkapte in Jesuh zahko-in simmawh bawl uh a, kumpi puantualpi a silhsak khit uh ciangin Pilat kiangah a puakkik uh hi
Hih hun ma-in Herod leh Pilat kilem loin kigalbawl uh a, ahi zongin tua ni mahmahin amaute gel kilem kikin kipawlbawl uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh a Si dingin Thu Kikhen

verses.text: Pilat in zong siampi liante, upate, leh mihonpite sam khawmin

amaute kiangah, “Hih mipa in i mipihte lam khialsak hi, ci-in mawhsakin kei kiangah nong paipih uh hi. Note khempeuh mai mahah amah thu ka sit a, amah na mawhsakna uh thute khat beekah a mawhna ka mu kei hi
Tua mah bangin Herod in zong ama mawhna mulo a, eite kiangah amah hong puakkik hi. Hih mipa in sihna a thuakna dingin ama gamtatna bangmah omlo hi
Tua ahih manin amah satna tawh thuhilhin ka khah ding hi,” a ci hi
(Paisan Pawi hun simin Pilat in amaute' deih thongkia khat a khah ding ahi hi
Tua ciangin mihon khempeuh kiko uh a, “Amah that in! Barabbas hong khahsak in!” a ci uh hi
Barabbas pen khuasungah mi a buaisakna hang, leh mi a thahna hangin thong sungah a kikhum ahi hi
Pilat in Jesuh khahnuam ahih manin mihonpite tungah khatvei a genkik hi
Ahi zongin mihonpite in, “Singlamteh tungah that in, singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a kiko uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute tungah a thumveina thu gen a, “Amah in bang mawhna bawl ahi hiam? Sihna a thuakna dingin ama gamtatna bangmah ka mu kei hi. Tua ahih manin amah satin ka khah ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin a aw neihzah uh tawh amaute awng semsem uh a, singlamteh tungah Jesuh a thahna ding gen uh ahih manin a tawpna-ah a zo uh hi
Tua ahih manin amaute' ngetna bangin piak dingin Pilat in thu a khen hi
Mi buaisakna leh mi thahna hangin thong sungah a kikhia mipa amau' ngetna bangin khah a, amau' deihna bangin a bawl dingun Jesuh a piakhia hi.

Tua ciangin amaute in Jesuh paikhiatpih uh a, gamsung panin khuapi sungah a hong pai, Sairin khuami Simon a kici mi khat tawh a kituak uh hi. Amaute in tuapa manpah uh a, a singlamteh suanin Jesuh' nung zui-in a puasak uh hi
Jesuh' nung zui-in mi tampi tak pai uh a, tuate lakah Jesuh kahin a tamlawh numei pawlkhat zong a kihel hi
Jesuh zong amaute lamah kihei a, “Jerusalem khua numeite aw, kei hong kah kei un la, note leh na tate uh-a' dingin kap un
Bang hang hiam cih leh mite in, ‘Ta a nei ngeilo, naungek nawi a teepsak ngeilo numei ciingte mi hampha mahmah ahi hi,’ a cih hun hong tung ding hi
Tua hun hong tun' ciangin mite in, ‘Mual lian mual neute in hong cipnelhin a si khin hi lehang utzaw hang,’ ci ding uh hi
Singkung hing bang ahi kei tungah hih bangin hong bawl uh ahih leh singkung keu bang ahi note tungah hong nak hihzaw kan ding uh hilo ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Mi that ahi, thonga kikhum mi nih zong, Jesuh tawh thahkhawm dingin a paipih uh hi
“Lutang Guh,” a kicihna mun a tun' uh ciangin singlamteh tungah Jesuh kilhcip uh a, tua mi that mi nihte zong, Jesuh' taklamah khat, a veilamah khat kilhcip uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Pa aw, amaute in bang hih ihi hiam cih theilo uh ahih manin a mawhna uh na maisak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amau' ngah ding ciat a theihna dingun ai sanin a puante a hawm uh hi
Jew mi upate in Jesuh zahko-in, “Amah in midangte honkhia hi. Pasian teelsa Khrih ahih takpi leh amah leh amah kihonkhia ta hen,” ci-in a simmawhbawl laitakun tua lai-a ding mite in a enen uh hi
Galkapte in zong zahpihbawl uh a, a kiangah hong pai-in leenggahzu thuk pia uh a
“Jew Mite' Kumpipa na hih takpi leh nang leh nang kihonkhia in,” a ci uh hi
“Jew Mite' Kumpipa hi,” ci-in a kigelh lai zong ama tung sanah kisuang hi
Amah tawh a kikhai khawm mi thatpa khat in zong Jesuh zahko a, “Nang Khrih hilo na hi hiam? Nangmah kihonkhia in la, tua ciangin kote zong hong honkhia in,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin a khatpa in a lawmpa taii a, “Pasian nangawn kihta lo na hi hiam? I vekpi-in gim hong kipiakna kibangkim hi
Eite gel pen i gamtatna tawh kizui-in thu hong kikhen ahih manin ahi ding mah ahi hi. Ahi zongin amah in khialhna bangmah neilo hi,” a cih khit ciangin
Jesuh kiangah, “Jesuh aw, Kumpi-in nong pai ciangin kei zong hong phawk in,” a ci hi
Jesuh in ama kiangah, “A mantakin ke'n kong cihin-ah: Tuni-in Paradais-ah kei tawh na omkhawm ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua hun laitak pen sunkim nai sawmlenih pawl hi a, ni mial ahih manin nitak lam nai thum ciangdong leitung khempeuhah khua mial a
tua hun sungin biakinn sung dalna puan kikekin phelnih a suak hi
Tua ciangin nakpi takin Jesuh kiko a, “Pa aw, nangma khutsungah keimah kong ki-ap hi,” a cih khit ciangin a si ta hi
Galkapmangpa in hih thupiang a muh ciangin Pasian phat a, “Hihpa, mihoih taktak khat ahi hi,” a ci hi
Hih thute a en dingin a hong pai mihonpite in a thupiang teng a muh uh ciangin dahin dip humsa-in a ciah uh hi
Galilee gam panin Jesuh a hong zui amah a thei ngei mite leh numeite in gal et uh ahih manin a thupiang khempeuh a thei uh hi.

Tua laitakin Josef a kici mi khat om a, Judea gamsunga om Arimathea khuami ahi hi. Amah pen mihoih, a zahtakhuai mi khat hi a, Pasian' Uk ding hun lamenin a ngakngak mi khat ahi hi. Amah pen ulian thuvaihawm sunga kihel hi a, ahi zongin a lawmte' vaihawmna leh a nasepnate uh thukimpih lo hi
Hih mipa Pilat kiangah va pai-in Jesuh' luang a va ngen hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh' luang la suk a, puankang tawh a tun khit ciangin kuamah a kivui ngei nailohna suang kikhuak hankhuk sungah a vui hi
Tua ni pen nipi zawh ni nga ni hi a, Sabbath ni hong hi dektak ta hi
Galilee gam panin a hong zui numeite in zong a kivuina-ah zui uh ahih manin a hanphual leh a luang kisialzia khempeuh zong a mu uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute ciah uh a, Jesuh' luang a nuh dingun paknamtui leh sathau a bawlkhol uh hi. Thukham zui-in Sabbath ni tawlnga-in a om uh hi.
